description: Supplementary difference sets (SDS) in abelian groups yield circulant matrices for the GS array. For H(668), need 4-{167; k1,k2,k3,k4; λ} SDS in Z_167 or 4-{166; 83,83,83,84; 166} SDS in Z_166 (Spence construction).
mathematical_formalization: S_1,...,S_4 ⊆ Z_167: for all g ≠ 0, sum_i |{(a,b) ∈ S_i × S_i : a-b ≡ g}| = λ
